ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_code" TEXT /* Code representing the security (e.g., RIC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security */,
  "market" TEXT /* The market in which the security is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for global identification */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the security */,
  "isin_issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the security */,
  "isin_country" TEXT /* Country of the security's issuer */,
  "isin_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., equity, bond) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security for which the data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data entry */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest sale price of the security on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest sale price of the security on the given date */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the given date */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of the security traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_opening_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price for splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted high price for splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted low price for splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_closing_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Post-market price */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Trading status (e.g., open, closed, halted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, download report) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security associated with the alert */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, shared) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups with whom the report is shared */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* User who shared the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
